title: 4 x Prices Ivory Altar Candle 100mm X 80mm 50 Hours Burn Time
features: This altar candle measuring 100mm x 80mm with a 50-hour burn time, designed to be smokeless and non-drip, is a premium and carefully crafted candle suitable for various religious or ceremonial purposes.

The dimensions of 100mm x 80mm indicate a substantial size, making it suitable for use on altars, during religious ceremonies, or as a decorative element in a sacred space. With a 50-hour burn time, this altar candle is designed to provide a long-lasting and steady flame, allowing for extended periods of use without the need for frequent replacement.

The smokeless feature ensures that the candle produces minimal to no smoke during burning, creating a clean and comfortable environment, especially in enclosed spaces. The non-drip design prevents the candle from creating wax drips as it burns. This feature is essential for maintaining the cleanliness and aesthetics of the candleholder or altar.

Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Never leave unattended. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
